javadoc_before: /** * Helpful for testing without loading config.xml. * * @param reader The {@link org.apache.lucene.index.IndexReader}. * @param queryString The query for which to elevate some documents. If the query has already been defined an * elevation, this method overwrites it. * @param subsetMatch true for query subset match; false for query exact match. * @param elevatedIds The readable ids of the documents to set as top results for the provided query. * @param excludedIds The readable ids of the document to exclude from results for the provided query. * @throws java.io.IOException If there is a low-level I/O error. */
javadoc_after: /** * Helpful for testing without loading config.xml. * * @param reader The {@link org.apache.lucene.index.IndexReader}. * @param queryString The query for which to elevate some documents. If the query has already been defined an * elevation, this method overwrites it. * @param subsetMatch true for query subset match; false for query exact match. * @param elevatedIds The readable ids of the documents to set as top results for the provided query. * @param excludedIds The readable ids of the document to exclude from results for the provided query. */
